chainId.description: Unique identifier for this dialogue chain

userId.description: ID of the user who owns this dialogue chain

topic.description: Topic or theme of this dialogue chain

summary.description: Brief summary of the dialogue chain

startedAt.description: When this dialogue chain was started

lastTurnAt.description: When the last turn was added to this chain

turnCount.description: Number of turns in this dialogue chain

status.description: Current status of the dialogue chain
